race.comment: Open race to close out the card. The well-related BRAVEHEART (1) (full to G2 winner King Of Sparta) had been plying his trade in harder Sydney contests before having his first run for the new stable here last time out. Was well supported on that occasion and where there's smoke there's fire. Ready to fire now. CLIMACTIC (2) has placed two from two around this circuit, gets 3kg weight relief with the claim and is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley. Ticks a few boxes. OUT OF TURN (6) resumes here but the form he showed when last in work was good enough to warrant consideration in a race of this calibre. Can run a big race while fresh. BREEZIN' (8) doesn't know how to run a bad race and may earn some minor money.
